title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji. The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: They are the groggy... moon-sters all

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Give me a hand for 10 seconds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That sounds like the right amount.

summary: The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.
